problem id: 073942b5
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(6) XOR SHL(1)

examples:
  01111100 -> 11100111
  00110110 -> 11100001
  00010000 -> 00100100
  00010011 -> 11100010
  01000101 -> 11011011
  01001101 -> 11001001
  10001101 -> 01111001
  10110100 -> 01000101
  00001101 -> 01011001

query: 01011000
predicted answer: 10100110
